title: 唐纳德·特朗普正为迷幻药物注入一股强劲动力
content: Donald Trump is actively supporting psychedelic medicine developments. He has made public statements and policy proposals aimed at removing regulatory hurdles and encouraging research into therapeutic uses of psychedelics, positioning the drug class as a potential medical advance. His advocacy includes calls for modernizing existing laws and promoting clinical trials, signaling a shift toward greater acceptance of psychedelic treatments in the United States.

title: 无休止战争的高昂代价
content: The Economist article discusses the escalating economic, social, and human costs associated with continuous armed conflict. It argues that protracted wars drain national resources, undermine global economic stability, and perpetuate cycles of violence and social disruption. The piece highlights how sustained warfare disrupts trade, degrades infrastructure, exacerbates inequality, and imposes long-term psychological burdens on societies. It calls for a strategic shift toward diplomatic solutions and peaceful conflict resolution to break this costly cycle.

normalizedTitle: 无休止战争的高昂代价

title: Agent v1.31.0 发布 | 全新 Easysearch 向导：一站式集群拉起与精细化管理
content: INFINI Agent v1.31.0 introduces an Easysearch installation wizard that removes the need for manual configuration. The GUI allows users to deploy or join clusters in development or production mode, handling download, JDK setup, certificate generation, parameter tuning, plugin installation, and node startup with progress monitoring and pause/resume. The wizard pre‑checks system compatibility, port usage, storage, and SSL validity, supports auto‑or manual certificates (shared or separate), and provides ongoing cluster management features such as node control, plugin updates, configuration edits, and integrated log viewing. Proxy support enables operation in restricted networks.
source: 开源中国-全部 - 极限实验室

title: 四评 DeepSeek
content: DeepSeek’s upcoming v4 is expected to build on the cost‑effective MoE advances seen in v3 and R1, aiming for superior price‑performance and stronger multimodal, long‑context, and AI‑agent capabilities. The release will further reduce reliance on Nvidia hardware by moving to Huawei’s CANN, fostering a self‑contained Chinese AI ecosystem. While the hype level remains uncertain, v4 is positioned to lead in enterprise AI agents, programming tasks, and to accelerate the company’s shift toward world‑model and general AI objectives.

title: GPT-5.5，刚刚泄露了
content: An accidental leak on OpenAI’s Codex platform exposed several internal model names—including GPT‑5.5, Glacier, Heisenberg, and Arcanine—to paying Pro users. The leak revealed that a staging environment had been mistakenly pushed to production, showing a hidden dropdown menu. GPT‑5.5 is described as an agentic coding model, while Glacier and Heisenberg suggest new architectures and a life‑science focus. OpenAI patched the issue quickly, but the incident highlighted the depth of their unseen product lines and sparked debate over whether it was a mere flaw or deliberate marketing.
eventKey: gpt-5-刚刚泄露了
normalizedTitle: gpt-5 5 刚刚泄露了

title: Ars Technica: Our newsroom AI policy
content: Ars Technica allows journalists to use AI tools for research, drafting, and editing, provided they follow policies that ensure transparency, accuracy, and respect for privacy. Reporters must verify AI‑generated content, disclose any tool use, and avoid relying on private user data. The newsroom encourages ethical AI integration, requiring editorial oversight and regular policy reviews.
eventKey: ars-technica-our-newsroom-policy
normalizedTitle: ars technica our newsroom ai policy

title: Arch Linux Now Has a Bit-for-Bit Reproducible Docker Image
content: Arch Linux has released a Docker image that is fully reproducible, meaning the binary output is identical on every build. This ensures consistency, security, and auditability for users and developers. The update demonstrates increased transparency and reliability in the Arch Linux ecosystem.

title: 大伙用 AI 会考虑在 user scope 的 CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md 里交代 AI 说中文吗
content:
如题。 我现在写了这几句：

  # Communication
  - 默认使用中文与我交流，除非我明确要求英文。
  - 代码、命令、错误信息、API 名称、文件路径保持原文。
  - 技术解释可以中英混用，但结论和沟通用中文。

title: 历史性时刻！Anthropic估值暴涨破万亿美元，首次超越OpenAI
content: Anthropic’s valuation has surged to nearly $1 trillion in private secondary markets, surpassing OpenAI’s $880 billion valuation. This spike follows Anthropic’s rapid revenue growth and the introduction of Claude Code, a product that extends coding and agent capabilities, making it a promising infrastructure player. OpenAI’s high starting valuation and extensive market visibility have capped its upside, while Anthropic’s limited shares and faster narrative updates fuel higher demand. The shift reflects investors prioritizing revenue potential and market entry control over pure model performance.
eventKey: 历史性时刻-anthropic估值暴涨破万亿美元-首次超越openai
normalizedTitle: 历史性时刻 anthropic估值暴涨破万亿美元 首次超越openai

title: 百亿AI初创公司Mercor涉嫌搜集和泄露个人数据引发合同工集体诉讼
content: Mercor, an AI startup valued at over ten billion dollars, faced a class lawsuit from contractors after accusations of collecting and disclosing personal data. The company clients include OpenAI, Anthropic, and Meta. Mercor hires specialist contractors to train its AI systems. Allegations claim the firm exposed interview footage and extensive personal information of these contractors. The legal action seeks damages and addresses privacy violations.

title: 特斯拉中国车机拟接入豆包大模型，已完成备案
content: Tesla’s China car system will incorporate the “Doubao” generative AI model and DeepSeek Chat by August 2025, after completing Shanghai’s new AI service filing. In July 2025, Tesla activated the Grok language model in the U.S. The company’s 2026 Q1 deliveries grew 6.3% year‑over‑year but fell 14.4% from the previous quarter; Shanghai’s plant hit a monthly delivery record in March, and Q1 overall sales rose 23.5% YoY. Tesla denied rumors of a new electric SUV; it plans to launch a six‑seat Model YL in China in August 2025.
eventKey: 特斯拉中国车机拟接入豆包大模型-已完成备案

title: OpenAI CEO 奥尔特曼抨击 Anthropic：为 Mythos「制造恐慌式营销」
content: Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, criticized Anthropic for its new Mythos safety model, saying the company exaggerates its effectiveness by playing on fears about technology. Altman argued that Mythos is presented as a tool against cybercrime but actually creates unnecessary technical barriers, reflecting a broader industry trend of leveraging perceived danger to appear powerful. He highlighted concerns about monopolistic practices and urged clearer boundaries for AI safety discussions.
eventKey: openai-ceo-奥尔特曼抨击-anthropic-mythos「制造恐慌式营销」
normalizedTitle: openai ceo 奥尔特曼抨击 anthropic 为 mythos「制造恐慌式营销」

title: Meta 将捕捉员工鼠标移动与击键操作，用于 AI 模型训练
content: Meta installs “Model Capability Initiative” tracking software on US employee computers to record mouse movements, clicks, keystrokes, and screenshots for AI model training. The data helps improve AI agents that can autonomously perform work tasks. Meta says it protects sensitive content and uses the information solely for training. The company is advancing AI‑driven workflows while announcing a global workforce reduction of 10% starting May 20, with potential further cuts.
eventKey: meta-将捕捉员工鼠标移动与击键操作-模型训练
